ascent.comment: Pose B: x = grade/course timeline (band-relaxed, as pose A x), y = longest-prerequisite-chain depth * yStep (graph invariant: every prereq edge points upward), z = relaxed cross-section z * zScale.

blueprint.comment: Pose C: flat 2D circuit board echoing Achieve the Core's original coherence map. 13 columns left to right (K, 1..8, then Appendix A courses A1/G/A2/ADV; the 23 dual A1&A2 standards sit in A1 only). x = column center (columnWidth apart, row centered on 0). Within a column, standards group into DOMAIN BLOCKS in canonical code order (the original map's own grouping, separated by blockGapFactor*rowGap), and a barycenter heuristic reorders rows WITHIN each block only: every prerequisite neighbor pulls with weight 1/column-distance (same-column neighbors at 0.5), barycenterSweeps alternating sweeps. Rows re-spaced uniformly at rowGap = min(rowGapMax, targetColumnHeight / tallestColumn), each column centered on y=0. Isolated (edgeless) nodes sit in a side gutter (+18) stacked from the column top. z = 0 everywhere. Same-column edges all bow LEFT (fixed convention; depth encodes hop span up to sameColumnBow). Grade/course etch labels sit on one shared baseline labelDrop below the deepest column, front-on.
